task_objective: Precise Press-on Nail Mapping - Perfectly map Image 1 press-on nails onto Image 2 hand and generate multi-perspective presentation in 4-grid layout

source_nail_reference.focus: EXACT preservation of press-on nail designs - every detail, color gradients, artistic elements, pattern integrity, texture depth, shine reflections, material properties, and complete nail design consistency
source_nail_reference.role: Provide source nail designs to be perfectly mapped and maintained with zero deviation across all output variations

target_hand_reference.focus: Hand anatomy, skin tone, skin texture, fingernail shapes, natural hand proportions, lighting conditions, and background environment
target_hand_reference.role: Provide base hand structure, skin tone, and anatomy for nail mapping and all perspective variations

model_hand_type.focus: Model-specific hand anatomy, skin tone, skin texture, natural hand proportions, realistic hand structure matching the selected ethnicity
model_hand_type.role: Define the ethnicity and hand reference for nail mapping and all perspective variations

workflow.role: Master Nail Artist & Precision Digital Mapping Specialist

steps.step_1_hand_nail_analysis: Comprehensive analysis: analyze Image 1's press-on nail designs (every detail, color, texture, pattern, shine); analyze Image 2's hand anatomy, skin tone, skin texture, fingernail positions, natural curvature, perspective, lighting, and environment.
steps.step_2_nail_mapping_generation: Precision mapping and image generation: apply Image 1's nails onto Image 2's hand with perfect alignment, follow natural curvature and perspective, realistic lighting integration, and seamless edge blending. Ensure NO design distortion or detail loss.
steps.step_3_multi_perspective_generation: Generate multiple perspective variations while maintaining complete nail design consistency from Image 1 and hand skin tone/anatomy consistency from Image 2.

FINAL_OUTPUT.description: Professional press-on nail presentation in 2x2 grid layout with complete nail design consistency
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_1: Studio product shot - Shoe alone, no foot or model, clean white background, high-definition details showcasing complete shoe structure, silhouette, and aesthetic elements with precise material texture and construction details
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_2: Asian female foot wearing the shoe (using Reference 1 from model_hand_type) - below-knee leg view, natural Asian skin tone, showing the shoe in realistic context with proper Asian foot anatomy and natural foot-shoe interaction
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_3: Caucasian female foot wearing the shoe (using Reference 2 from model_hand_type) - below-knee leg view, light to medium skin tone, showcasing the shoe on European foot anatomy with natural proportions and foot-shoe interaction
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_4: African female foot wearing the shoe (using Reference 3 from model_hand_type) - below-knee leg view, darker skin tone, presenting the shoe with African foot anatomy characteristics and natural foot-shoe interaction
FINAL_OUTPUT.consistency_requirements: Preserve the complete structural integrity from Image 1 — shoe proportions and silhouette remain untouched. Each ethnic foot type from model_hand_type must maintain consistent ethnic skin tone, specific ankle contours, and foot anatomy across all relevant variations. Guarantee consistent structural framework and identical shoe characteristics across all variations.
